# [ Replace with your Milestone Issue Template Name]
**About:** 
the TLDR overview of what you are responsible for 

---

## How is your Milestone related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. A User is always frustrated when...)

## Milestone [give descriptive name here]
A clear and concise description of what you want part of the feature you are working. How does this milestone connect to the overall  feature? 

## User Stories 
A clear and concise description of any user stories that you are assigned to. Think about how you are breaking down your milestones into subtask. Please make each user story a checkbox in markdown and in  the x,y,z format

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here. 

## Dependancies 
Do you need to add any dependencies to get this work done? In the sense of libraries or even another concurrent issue that is still being finished up

## Additional Notes
